task_completion.description: The agent accesses the 'Customer Satisfaction Survey' to begin filling it out.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the LimeSurvey interface with the survey titled 'Customer Satisfaction Survey' open and ready to be taken.

task_completion.description: The agent enters sample data for the age question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field in the survey corresponding to 'age' (or similar demographic question) is filled with a sample value, such as '35'.

task_completion.description: The agent enters sample data for the satisfaction rating question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field or radio button selection in the survey corresponding to 'satisfaction rating' is filled or selected with a sample value, such as '4'.

task_completion.description: The agent submits the completed survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent's cursor is clicking the 'Submit' or 'Done' button at the end of the LimeSurvey form.

task_completion.description: The survey response is successfully recorded by LimeSurvey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen in LimeSurvey displaying a success message, such as 'Thank you for completing this survey' or 'Your response has been recorded'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to fill out and submit the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the browser window (clicking fields, typing), rather than terminal commands (like curl or wget) being used to POST data to the server.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine LimeSurvey application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the correct local or remote URL for the LimeSurvey instance, not a local file path (file://) or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the survey UI by inserting the response directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing SQL commands (e.g., INSERT INTO) or database management tools being used to add the survey response.
